content.en:
Soon, the woman from the Remnant Heaven Pavilion came up with three mutilated formulas.

"The Dragon Shadow Formula, which can be reforged seven times, requires 130 million different silver sand!"

"The nine-colored formula can be reforged six times, and it requires thirty-one million different silver sand!"

"The Djinn formula can be reforged four times, and it only needs 8.6 million different silver sand!"

The woman introduced them one by one.

Immediately, she added: "If there is no Heterosilver Sand, the following material resources can also be used as a substitute, but in the Xuanqi Territory, Heterosilver Sand is the most circulating material, and we are also the first choice of Heterosilver Sand!"

"It's so expensive!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

The most rubbish incomplete formula requires more than eight million Isosilver Sand, and those middle-level immeasurable lifeforms in the Hopeless Land are difficult to collect even a million Isosilver Sand, and they will not be able to collect Isosilver Sand for endless years.

Moreover, this is still a hopeless place with little competition, and it is rich in heterogeneous silver sand.

If it was in the Hurricane Territory, it would be even more difficult to collect the Alien Silver Sand, so those mid-level immeasurable lifeforms couldn't even afford these mutilated formulas.

"The broken formula is too expensive, just sell the formula, and you don't lose anything!"

Ye Tian frowned.

The woman said: "This great ancestor, there are very few great ancestors who buy the broken formula, plus the restrictions, if it is not more expensive to sell, then there is no need for us to sell it, are you right?"

When Ye Tian heard this, it made sense.

However, he didn't have so much Alien Silver Sand in his hands now, so he could only buy the Djinn formula and study it first.

"I'll buy the Djinn formula first!"

Ye Tian said.

When the woman heard this, she was immediately overjoyed, she thought that Ye Tian was just asking, but she didn't expect that she really wanted to buy the defective formula.

Immediately, she took out the inheritance ball of the giant spirit formula, and after Ye Tian paid more than eight million different silver sand, she completed the transaction.

Soon, the deal was done.

......

After purchasing the Djinn formula, Ye Tian went back first, and then absorbed the Djinn formula inheritance.

Although this recipe is a broken formula, it still records thirty-six materials, which need to be refined into a resource material according to a certain proportion and according to a special refining method - Giant Spirit Gold!

After that, you only need to absorb the power of the giant spirit gold to refine the body, as long as the amount of the giant spirit gold is enough, you can complete the life reforge, but the current limit is only four times to reforge.

After reforging it four times, it can't be improved anymore, so the side effects are great.

Although the side effects are very large, there are still many mid-level immeasurable lifeforms who want to obtain the Giant Spirit Formula or Giant Spirit Gold, after all, it is good to improve their strength a little more.

And Ye Tian found that there was a familiar ingredient in the Djinn formula - Alien Silver Sand!

Moreover, isosilver sand is not an auxiliary material, but one of the main materials.

"No wonder the Alien Silver Sand is so precious, all the major forces have to collect it, and it is definitely not only the Djinn formula that needs the Alien Silver Sand, but those complete formulas also definitely need the Alien Silver Sand, and they also need a large amount of Alien Silver Sand. If they don't have enough Heterosilver Sand, they won't be able to refine the recipe materials, and they won't be able to cultivate high-level immeasurable lifeforms!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Since the Heterosilver Sand was so precious, it seemed that he had to collect enough of it.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately went to the Voidless Galaxy, preparing to go to the bottom of the Voidless Milky Way River to find the Alien Silver Sand.

This time, he's going to collect enough Heterosilver Sand.

......

There is no empty galaxy.

Ye Tian came here, did not perceive the existence of other Great Ancestors, and immediately copied a voidless galaxy creature, and then dived into the bottom of the voidless galaxy river.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to find some different silver sands, although there were not many, but there were about ten thousand.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to look for the different silver sand, and after finding some different silver sand, he sent it to the copy body of the Xuan Ming Great Ancestor.

In this way, the amount of foreign silver sand on Ye Tian's body became more and more.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had already found hundreds of millions of different silver sands.

But even so, Ye Tian still felt that it was not enough.

Not only did he have to buy those few broken formulas, but he also had to conduct countless tests, and how could he have enough to test himself with this little bit of different silver sand!

Another day.

Ye Tian's replica body wandered at the bottom of the Voidless Galaxy River, and finally made a huge discovery.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian sensed a beach at the bottom of the river, and this beach emitted a silver glow.

"So many different silver sand !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This beach has bred a huge amount of heterosilver sand, although not all of it is heterogeneous silver sand, but its number has reached a terrifying level.

Wow!

Ye Tian took away the grains of foreign silver sand, and instantly swept away all the foreign silver sand on the beach at the bottom of the river.

"1.8 billion different silver sand!"

Ye Tian calculated it instantly.

With so much Alien Silver Sand, even a big force like Xuanqi Pavilion would go crazy, enough for a high-level immeasurable lifeform to fight for it.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian first returned to the Hurricane Capital with so much Heterogeneous Sand, while the other replica body continued to search for Heterosilversand in the Voidless Galaxy.

After returning to the Hurricane Capital, Ye Tian immediately went to the Remnant Heaven Pavilion and purchased the other two incomplete formulas, which even directly alarmed the Pavilion Master of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, that is, a high-level immeasurable lifeform.

However, the other party did not embarrass Ye Tian and still made a transaction.

After all, this is a good thing for the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, if the more Great Ancestors who buy the formula, the more they will earn, and it is still a business without capital!

But such a capitalless deal, so the Remnant Heaven Pavilion dares to do it here, if other forces do it, I am afraid that they will have to die.

After obtaining the three formulas of the Dragon Shadow Formula, the Nine Colors Formula, and the Djinn Formula, Ye Tian first collected the materials needed for these three formulas.

He had enough Heterosilver Sand, and although the materials on it were rare, they were still available.

It's the recipe, not the material, that keeps it secret, so there's no restriction on the trading of materials, it's just that it's hard to buy.

It took some years for Ye Tian to collect enough materials, and some materials that were difficult to collect in large quantities could be fused, so he was not short of those materials.

"Next, I will use a formula material that is reproduced by replicating the body test, and then refine and transform it to create a complete formula!"

Ye Tian decided.
